_comment: PLAN-041 Phase 3 / ADR-062 — sidecar config template. Adopter copies to ~/.ceo-orchestration/rag/config.json and edits. File must be chmod 0600.

tcp_fallback.comment: To enable: set CEO_RAG_SIDECAR_TRANSPORT=tcp + CEO_RAG_TCP_ACK=I-UNDERSTAND-LOOPBACK-IS-NOT-AUTH. Windows-only; bearer token auto-generated.

indexing._mode_comment: 'naive' (no LLM), 'local' (2 LLM calls), 'hybrid' (3 LLM calls). bridge.py default expects 'naive'-compatible response shapes; 'local'/'hybrid' require CEO_RAG_QUERY_TIMEOUT_MS=15000+.
indexing._scan_comment: Runs _lib.output_scan.scan() on every chunk before embedding. LLM06 patterns drop the chunk + emit rag_index_redacted. Security P0-4 mitigation.

logging._redact_comment: Query strings may contain user secrets; redact via _lib.redact.redact_secrets before writing.
